info.name: MindBridge API
info.description:
Complete test suite for the MindBridge Spring Boot API.

## Setup
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:8080` (or your server address).
2. Run **[Auth] Register (Psicólogo)** and **[Auth] Login (Psicólogo)** in that order — the login request auto-saves the JWT token into the `token` collection variable.
3. All subsequent requests use that token automatically via the collection-level Authorization header.

## Roles
- `ROLE_ESTUDIANTE` — default role for registered users.
- `ROLE_PSICOLOGO` — required for creating/modifying most resources. Must be set manually in the DB / or via a seed after registration.
- `ROLE_ADMIN` — super role.

## Test Order (Happy Path)
1. Auth → Register → Login
2. Factores de Riesgo → List → Create → Get by ID → Update → Toggle
3. Evaluaciones → Iniciar → Responder → Get → Resultado → Listar
4. Alertas → Listar → Get by ID → Criticas → Atender
5. Intervenciones → Registrar → Get → Update → Listar por Alerta
6. Profesionales → Listar
7. Recursos de Apoyo → Listar → Create → Get → Update → Toggle → Delete
8. AI → Clasificar → Analizar Texto → Recomendar → Detectar Patrón

pm.test('Status is 400 when estudianteId is missing', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
